title: SonicWall security advisory (AV26-405)
description: On April 29, 2026, SonicWall published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: Gen6 Hardware Firewalls  firmware version 6.5.5.1-6n and prior
Gen7 NSv  firmware version 7.0.1-5169 and prior, firmware version 7.3.1-7013 and prior
Gen7 Firewalls  firmware version 7.0.1-5169 and prior, firmware version 7.3.1-7013 and prior
Gen8 Firewalls  firmware version 8.1.0-8017 and prior
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
